description: Style NoteAdd a pop meets punk edge to this season to your summer staples from sepia. Style this piece with non-typical wardrobe updaters like a chunky bracelet or clunky heels to add an instant spunk to your ensemble. For a girly vibe, wear this with a pastel scarf or shrug and a whimsical hair accessory - effortless spring style! Product DetailsPink tunic top, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, short sleeves, elastication at the sides of the waist and the front hem shorter than the backMaterial and CarePolyester blendRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
